title: Proof-Governed Multi-Agent Institution
doctrine: Large multi-agent systems coordinate to maximum effect when they become proof-governed sovereign institutions.
coordinationLaw: Maximum coordination = maximum verified useful work per unit of risk, cost, latency, and proof debt.
workEquation: AI Work = Output × Proof × Validation × Settlement × Reuse

loops.name: Validation loop
loops.flow: Verifier Mesh → Risk Ledger → Governed Decision State

loops.name: Compounding loop
loops.flow: Chronicle → Capability Package → Settlement → Harder Mission

routerFamily.name: Hybrid proof-conditioned selector
routerFamily.role: production arbitration by task, cost, risk, validators, evidence density, and auditability

claimBoundary: This is a browser-local demonstration and implementation scaffold. It is not an empirical maximum-performance claim, investment advice, legal advice, factual certification, external audit completion, or Mainnet transaction record.
